value.found_quote: Codex CLI can do far more than run ad-hoc tasks. By exposing the CLI as a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server and orchestrating it with the OpenAI Agents SDK, you can create deterministic, reviewable workflows that scale from a single agent to a complete software delivery pipeline.
value.rationale: The page has an entire section titled "Creating multi-agent workflows" that explicitly describes exposing Codex CLI as an MCP server and orchestrating it with the Agents SDK to build multi-agent workflows. The page provides detailed code examples, step-by-step instructions, and a full multi-agent workflow implementation, directly substantiating the claim. The content is presented as current/generally available documentation with no preview or beta caveats.
